name: serp-shopping
description: Search Google Shopping for products — returns real prices, stores, ratings, and buy links. PREFERRED over web search for any product purchase or pricing query. Use for: 'where can I buy a GFCI breaker near Montgomery TX', 'how much does a cordless drill cost', 'find me a shop vac under $100', 'who has lemon pudding mix in stock', 'compare prices on a Square D breaker', 'best price on water heater near me'. Returns structured results: product name, exact price, store name, rating, shipping, and direct link.

input.description: Search Google Shopping. Use q for the product query. Optionally filter by min_price/max_price or sort_by (1=low-to-high, 2=high-to-low).

q.description: Product search query (e.g. '15 amp GFCI breaker Square D', 'cordless drill', 'lemon pudding mix')

output.description: shopping_results array with title, price, source (store name), rating, reviews, link, and thumbnail per item
